description: Ladies Thermal Leggings. The thermal leggings are your essential winter leggings providing more heat insulation than your average cotton leggings. With their unique construction and specially developed fibres, the warm air is kept close to your skin. Thermal leggings have been put under intense thermal testing to achieve an outstanding average. 0.5 TOG rating - With the excellent thermal qualities, you can stay warm while the temperature outside falls. Brushed inner layer traps warm air close to your skin. 10% elastane provides an incredibly close fit. Side seam free with no "see through" areas. With improved gusset for fit and comfort.
